hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.css|*.html|*.svg) : ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$f")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" && git add "$f" && git diff --cached --quiet && exit 0; git commit -m "auto: update $(basename "$f")" && git push; } 2>/dev/null || true
